name: Dump Cake#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Dump the cherry pie filling and crushed pineapple into a 9 x 13-inch pan. Do not stir.
2. Sprinkle the cake mix evenly over the fruit mixture.
3. Dot the top with butter slices.
4. Sprinkle the chopped nuts on top.
5. Bake at 375 degrees F for 1 hour.
6. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream, whipped cream, or plain cream poured over top.
This recipe is a classic example of a simple and rich dump cake that can be enjoyed with a variety of toppings.
